missingSurface: Authoritative approver graph and verified role lookup for ApprovalCheckpoint approval.
temporaryFallback: Require presented approver roles, block self-approval, and fail closed when the policy-required role is missing.
riskIfUnresolved: Approval remains safer than implicit self-approval but still depends on caller-presented role claims rather than repository-native authorization graph truth.
followUpAction: Replace presentedRoleRefs with centrally verified approver graph resolution and tenant-scoped role attestation.
